title: Lesson 43
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: having little money or low quality
words.example: The poor sound quality made the video hard to hear.

words.meaning: pleased because of something you did or have
words.example: She felt proud of her test score.
We had a quick lunch before class.

words.meaning: not common or not often seen
words.example: It is rare to see snow here.
This path is safe for children.

words.meaning: important, not funny, or needing careful thought
words.example: The doctor found a serious problem.

words.meaning: small in length, height, or time
words.example: We took a short break after lunch.
The room became silent before the speech.
The slow bus made us late.
The baby slept on a soft blanket.
